title: Senior Teacher - Gradeup - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Gradeup - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
